title: The Frontier of Communication
body:
Communication is being transformed by AI-generated text, synthetic media, voice cloning, and multimodal platforms that combine image, sound, and language. The field now has to think about authenticity as well as clarity.

Teams are also using more asynchronous tools, collaboration platforms, and compressed video formats, which means the way organisations talk internally is changing fast.

The frontier question is how to keep communication human, trustworthy, and context-aware while the tools that produce it become more automated and more scalable.

That will shape work, politics, journalism, and relationships alike.
keyPoints: Organisations need consistent voice across channels
